title: minecraft CRT
description: A simple customizable CRT shader with a sprinkle of analog horror.
body:
# mCRT


mCRT is a simple highly customizable analog horror shader primarily designed to emulate CRT monitors.

---
### Features
\- Customizable pixel size\
\- Various colorful overlays\
\- Fully adjustable fog\
\- Customizable scan flicker\
\- Variable screen static\
\- Chromatic aberration

![A screenshot of the minecraft CRT shader, showing a stone room with a fountain.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZeqDZZRS/images/2e428e32b1c6aea5fad09e38847b525877473414.png)
---
![A screenshot of the minecraft CRT shader, showing an endless stone hallway](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZeqDZZRS/images/0684e95809ec858325f0ab90db357da8be1568fb.png)
---
![A screenshot of the minecraft CRT shader in NVG mode, showing a landscape at night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZeqDZZRS/images/2dd9f093abb76b3923902bbd8be855e5f75a4b14.png)

This shader is an adaptation (and expansion) of Xor's wonderful CRT shader for GameMaker, which can be found [here](https://mini.gmshaders.com/p/gm-shaders-mini-crt).
